response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates over a decade of full-stack development experience with a strong emphasis on TypeScript, Node.js, and modern frontend frameworks like React. His roles at re:cinq and Optilyz align closely with the job's stack and responsibilities, including AI-agent infrastructure and scalable tooling. His open-source contributions and leadership in developer tooling further validate his technical depth and initiative.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven track record in AI-agent development and developer tooling
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js (though Node.js experience is extensive)
Some roles involved niche languages (DLang) not directly relevant to the stack
German language skills are basic (though English is fluent)
